message:
fix(time,runtime,net): soften repoll guards from panic to error return

TimeoutFuture: replace assert!(!completed) panics with
if-completed-return-Elapsed in both poll() and poll_with_time() paths.
Repolling after completion now returns Err(Elapsed) instead of
crashing, which is diagnosable and does not kill the runtime. Update
tests: rename from _panics to _returns_elapsed, replace catch_unwind
with direct match on Poll::Ready(Err(_)). Also replace closure
CURRENT_TIME.with(|t| t.get()) with method reference
CURRENT_TIME.with(Cell::get).

YieldNow: replace assert!(!completed) panic with if-completed return
Poll::Ready(()). A yield-then-done future is trivially idempotent
after completion. Update test: rename from _panics to _returns_ready,
remove #[should_panic], assert Ready(()) on third poll.

ResolverTimeout (net/dns/resolver.rs): add `completed` field to the
internal ResolverTimeout wrapper. After returning Ok(output) or
Err(Elapsed), subsequent polls return Err(Elapsed) immediately
without re-driving the inner DNS resolution future. This prevents
a completed resolver lookup from being accidentally restarted.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
